untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'news announcement contradicts prior regime belief' and measurement of 'price underreacts: moves 35-65% of historical normal move' — these require external news data/sentiment indicators and dynamic baseline comparison not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal is fundamentally event-driven and requires news feed integration beyond technical indicators.
translation_notes: Partially translated entry conditions using available volume and body size proxies for underreaction detection. Exit conditions use moving average crosses as a reversal proxy for 'full adjustment target reached.' Price bounce from support/resistance and specific 35-65% underreaction threshold cannot be operationalized without news event timestamps and dynamic expectation baselines.
